title: FDIC Bank Failure
description: A failed financial institution record from the FDIC BankFind Suite API, covering failures from 1934 to present.

CERT.description: FDIC certificate number of the failed institution.

NAME.description: Legal name of the failed institution.

FIN.description: Failure identification number assigned by FDIC.

CITYST.description: City and state of the failed institution's headquarters.

FAILDATE.description: Date on which the institution failed.

FAILYR.description: Year in which the institution failed.

SAVR.description: Supervisory agency responsible for the institution at failure.

RESTYPE.description: Primary resolution type used to resolve the failed institution.

QBFDEP.description: Estimated insured deposits at failure (in thousands of dollars).

QBFASSET.description: Total assets of the institution at failure (in thousands of dollars).

COST.description: Estimated loss to the Deposit Insurance Fund (in thousands of dollars).
